meta.title: Laboratory diagnosis of legionnaires' disease due to Legionella pneumophila serogroup 1: comparison of phenotypic and genotypic methods

abstractHtml: In the summary section (p. 183), the ranges 510 and 1015 days after onset should read 610 and 1115 days after onset, respectively. In the Results and Discussion (`Legionella antigen in urine', first paragraph; DFA and culture', second paragraph), the range 510 days after onset should read 610 days after onset.
